description: OpenAI-compatible API for Poolside's Laguna coding models.
prompt_training_notes: Poolside's Terms say it may use Content for training unless the user opts out. The Terms also state that third-party platform opt-out settings may govern. For the opted-out route, classify provider handling as logs rather than private/no-storage; safety-review and feedback exceptions still apply.
data_policy_contract_notes: The public Terms establish an opt-out mechanism but do not provide a general zero-retention guarantee. This route is classified as logs based on the opted-out account configuration; verify the account or upstream platform setting if it changes. Poolside may still use content for safety review or when feedback is provided.
